Complete Material Options

Built with premium 6-layer melamine-faced plywood featuring superior moisture resistance, termite protection, and fire-rated construction. Choose from melamine solids named for popular Sherwin-Williams paint colors, textured woodgrain melamine, or phenolic plastic for extreme durability in high-moisture environments. All materials are ENF certified (zero harmful chemicals), water-resistant, and anti-fungal. Available in any dimension with your choice of finish, color, and hardware. Custom colors available upon request.

Essential Wood

Cabinet-Grade Pre-Finished Birch Plywood for Wood Lockers

Our lockers are built using 19mm pre-finished birch plywood, a high-quality panel material known for its smooth face, stable veneer core, and attractive natural wood look. With a durable UV-coated finish on both sides, this plywood is ideal for creating strong, professional-grade wood lockers that perform well in demanding locker room settings.
